data.name: Indicator_Description
data.value: Renders MenthorQ option-derived levels (Gamma Wall, Call Resistance, Put Support, etc.) on the chart, with sources from manual text paste or live API fetch, customisable visibility and colour per category, cross-level alerts with reversal notifications, and an optional diagnostic overlay.

data.name: EnableManualText_Description
data.value: Enable pasting MenthorQ levels as comma-separated text. Ignored when the API is configured and reachable.

data.name: IndexTextRaw_Description
data.value: Paste MenthorQ output for an Index or ETF ticker (SPX / NDX / RUT, or SPY / QQQ / IWM). Multiplier and offset below are applied to these prices in that order.

data.name: FuturesTextRaw_Description
data.value: Paste MenthorQ output for the Futures ticker (ES / NQ / RTY). Offset is not applied to these prices.

data.name: TextMultiplier_Description
data.value: Applied to every Index-text price BEFORE the offset. Most common case: ETF data → Futures chart. Approx ratios at current index levels: SPY → ES ≈ 10, QQQ → NQ ≈ 41, IWM → RTY ≈ 10. Ratios drift with index level — recalibrate periodically. Default 1 (no scaling). Futures text is never transformed.

data.name: TextOffset_Description
data.value: Added to every price parsed from the Index text, to align SPX levels to ES, NDX to NQ, etc. Futures text is never offset.

data.name: ClearManualTextNow_Description
data.value: Toggle to clear both Index and Futures text fields. Self-resets.

data.name: ApiKey_Description
data.value: MenthorQ API key. When set together with User ID, the API becomes the active data source and manual text is ignored.

data.name: UserId_Description
data.value: Email associated with your MenthorQ account. Sent as the user_id query parameter on every request.

data.name: TickerOverride_Description
data.value: Optional. Leave empty to use the chart instrument (micros are auto-stripped: MES→ES, MNQ→NQ). Set a value to force a specific ticker (e.g. SPX on ES, or ES when the feed exposes ESH24).

data.name: ApiMultiplier_Description
data.value: Applied to every API-fetched price BEFORE the offset. Most common case: ETF API feed → Futures chart. Approx ratios at current index levels: SPY → ES ≈ 10, QQQ → NQ ≈ 41, IWM → RTY ≈ 10. Ratios drift with index level — recalibrate periodically. Default 1 (no scaling). Applied at engine time — does not trigger an API refetch.

data.name: ApiOffset_Description
data.value: Added to every API-fetched price AFTER the multiplier. Combined formula: (raw_price × multiplier) + offset. Applied at engine time — changing it does not trigger an API refetch.

data.name: UpdateLevels_Description
data.value: Fetch latest levels from the MenthorQ API. Self-resets.

data.name: GammaWall_Description
data.value: Visibility and colour for GW lines, halos and labels.

data.name: CallResistance_Description
data.value: Visibility and colour for CR lines, halos and labels.

data.name: PutSupport_Description
data.value: Visibility and colour for PS lines, halos and labels.

data.name: HighVolatilityLevel_Description
data.value: Visibility and colour for HVL lines, halos and labels.

data.name: RiskTrigger_Description
data.value: Visibility and colour for RT lines, halos and labels.

data.name: UpperBand_Description
data.value: Visibility and colour for UB lines, halos and labels.

data.name: LowerBand_Description
data.value: Visibility and colour for LB lines, halos and labels.

data.name: GammaExposure_Description
data.value: Visibility and colour for GEX N lines, halos and labels.

data.name: BlindSpot_Description
data.value: Visibility and colour for BL N lines, halos and labels.

data.name: DayMax_Description
data.value: Visibility and colour for 1D Max lines, halos and labels.

data.name: DayMin_Description
data.value: Visibility and colour for 1D Min lines, halos and labels.

data.name: Swing_Description
data.value: Visibility and colour for Swing lines, halos and labels.

data.name: Other_Description
data.value: Visibility and colour for fallback / unrecognised labels.

data.name: EnableAlerts_Description
data.value: Master switch for cross-level alerts. When off, nothing is emitted regardless of category visibility.

data.name: AlertSoundFile_Description
data.value: Filename of the sound played when an alert fires. ATAS resolves bundled names like 'alert1.wav' from its sound directory; absolute paths work too.

data.name: EnableReversalAlerts_Description
data.value: When a cross alert fires and price reverts back across the level within the cooldown window, emit a follow-up alert at cooldown expiry.

data.name: AlertCooldownSeconds_Description
data.value: Minimum time between consecutive alerts on the same level price. Prevents alert storms when price oscillates around a level.

data.name: EnableDebugOverlay_Description
data.value: Renders a small status box in a corner of the chart showing internal indicator state: resolved ticker, active source, level/entry counts, pending alerts, API status, and current text/API multiplier+offset values. Default off — turn on when diagnosing why levels are missing or misaligned.

data.name: OverlayLocation_Description
data.value: Corner of the chart where the debug overlay is anchored. Default TopRight to avoid colliding with the OHLC info that ATAS draws in the top-left under the cursor.

data.name: EnableAutoRefresh_Description
data.value: Automatically refresh API levels following MenthorQ's documented intraday schedule (14 fixed EST update slots: pre-market at 08:00 plus every 30 minutes from 09:50 to 15:50). A small post-slot delay lets the data settle on MenthorQ's end before the fetch fires. Toggling this on triggers an immediate catch-up fetch. EOD slots (18:30 / 23:00 EST) are not auto-refreshed; press Update Levels manually after market close if needed.

data.name: SpeedOfTapeV3_Description
data.value: Event-driven tape speed detector. Dynamic histogram with High Water Mark (HWM) frozen bars color-coded by burst direction. Features a dynamic percentile-based threshold, persistent price-panel zones with fading extension lines, and a floating info panel with real-time metrics.

data.name: TimeWindow_Description
data.value: Length of the sliding window used to calculate speed. Smaller values increase reactivity but add noise; larger values smooth out micro-bursts.

data.name: DataType_Description
data.value: Metric accumulated within the time window. Ticks: counts operations; Volume: sums contracts; Delta: net difference between buying and selling aggression; Buy/Sell Volume: isolate a single side.

data.name: ContextWindowMinutes_Description
data.value: The lookback period used to compute the percentile threshold. Adapts to session volatility: short enough to track phase shifts, long enough to remain statistically stable.

data.name: ThresholdPercentile_Description
data.value: Speed level above which a burst is detected. P95 represents speeds occurring only 5% of the time in the recent context. Higher values increase selectivity.

data.name: ZoneDisplay_Description
data.value: Defines how burst zones appear on the price chart. 'All events' shows every detection; 'Primary only' highlights only the highest-speed burst per bar; 'Hidden' disables the price overlay.

data.name: BuyColor_Description
data.value: Color for zones with buying dominance. Efficiency near 1 renders this color as pure; lower efficiency blends it toward the neutral color.

data.name: SellColor_Description
data.value: Color for zones with selling dominance. Efficiency near 1 renders this color as pure; lower efficiency blends it toward the neutral color.

data.name: NeutralColor_Description
data.value: Color used when a burst is balanced (efficiency below 0.3) or as the base for low-efficiency directional blends.

data.name: ExtensionBars_Description
data.value: Number of bars to the right drawn at full opacity. The horizontal line marks the center of the burst's price range as a transient support/resistance reference.

data.name: FadeBars_Description
data.value: Number of bars following the full-opacity segment drawn with linearly decreasing transparency (alpha). Set to 0 for an abrupt cutoff.

data.name: ShowInfoPanel_Description
data.value: Toggle the floating panel that lists the most recent burst events and their metrics.

data.name: InfoPanelPosition_Description
data.value: Chart corner where the info panel is anchored.

data.name: MaxEventsInPanel_Description
data.value: Number of recent bursts visible in the panel. Older events are automatically removed as new data arrives.

data.name: UseAlerts_Description
data.value: Master switch for audio and popup notifications on detected bursts. Disabled by default.

data.name: AlertFile_Description
data.value: The .wav file name. Use defaults ('alert1', 'alert2') or place custom files in the ATAS sounds folder.

data.name: SpeedOfTapeV3_AlertCooldownSeconds_Description
data.value: Minimum time between alerts to prevent notification spam. Set to 0 to receive all alerts without restriction.

data.name: LevelsLolo_Description
data.value: Draws SpotGamma-style option levels (Combo, Large Gamma, Volatility Trigger, Call Wall, Put Wall, Zero Gamma) derived from comma-separated text. Features configurable line styles per category, rank-based width and opacity tiers, optional cyan halo for 0DTE labels, and a dotted highlight for high-priority 0DTE levels (LG/PW/CW within the thick tier).

data.name: LevelsLolo_LastBarOnly_Description
data.value: Extend to the last visible bar instead of the right chart edge.
